name: prw
description: Extract, check, update, and relink academic paper knowledge in an EPI-compatible Obsidian/LLM Wiki.

interface.shortDescription: v0.1.0 | Deposit EPI papers into a source-grounded wiki.
interface.longDescription: Paper Research Wiki gives users one plugin-level assistant for EPI-collected papers. The default path is to inspect EPI handoffs, identify ready papers, and deposit them into the wiki while keeping detailed provenance, source-first review, page-family rules, relinking, linting, and taxonomy maintenance inside internal workflows so users do not need to learn many skill names.
defaultPrompt: 提取并直接沉淀 EPI 抓下来的论文到 wiki。
检测论文 wiki 库的状态、缺口和待处理任务。
更新论文 wiki 库，继续沉淀、重link 和修复 ready 的论文。
